case_title: GARY HEAD & PARTNERS PAINTING CORP. VS. ALEXANDRA OWEN

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARY HEAD & PARTNERS PAINTING CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT OWEN, ALEXANDRA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARY HEAD & PARTNERS PAINTING CORP.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY GARY HEAD & PARTNERS PAINTING CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT OWEN, ALEXANDRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-16-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-16-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-16-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. FIOL. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-16-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARY HEAD & PARTNERS PAINTING CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OWEN, ALEXANDRA $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $545.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY ALEXANDRA OWEN IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JUAN MARTINEZ--OWNER CORP./ CEO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT OWEN, ALEXANDRA HEARING SET FOR JUN-25-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARY HEAD & PARTNERS PAINTING CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OWEN, ALEXANDRA $465.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $510.00, CONCURRENT WITH PAYMENT OF THE JUDGMENT, PLAINTIFF SHALL RETURN TO DEFENDANT AT DEFENDANT'S ADDRESS ALL PAINTING MATERIALS FOR WHICH DEFENDANT HAS PAID TO PLAINTIFF. MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
